subcodes.first_line: We have adorned thee with the ornament of Our grace and given thee glad tidings of that which hath been ordained for thee by Our Most Exalted Pen. Be thou steadfast in the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا زیناک بطراز عنایتی و بشرناک بما قدر لک من قلمی الاعلی ان استقم علی الامر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
